report.recommendation: Add CLUSTER BY (EVENT_DATE, VENUE_ID) via dbt model config
report.rationale: 92% of queries filter on EVENT_DATE (range scans), 45% on VENUE_ID (point lookups). Current pruning at 35% — clustering should improve to 80%+.
risks: Initial clustering will consume compute credits
Ongoing maintenance cost for incremental loads

output.implementation_sql: ALTER TABLE DW.RPT.TRANSACTION CLUSTER BY (EVENT_DATE, VENUE_ID);
caveats: Since table is dbt-managed, prefer adding cluster_by to dbt model config
ALTER TABLE will work but may be overwritten on next full refresh
Monitor AUTOMATIC_CLUSTERING_HISTORY for maintenance credit usage

decision_log.rationale: Clear filter pattern dominance, large table, poor current pruning

alternatives_considered.reason: Table is large enough to benefit
SOS would help VENUE_ID but clustering alone may suffice
Patterns are clear enough to act now
